there s a version of  alright  where the tempo is almost ten beats per minute slower  and i keep a rough mix of it on my phone  some nights that version is the one that makes more sense to me

there was a version of  crazy in love  that was slower  way slower  like a lullaby  almost  jay heard it and said absolutely not  and he was completely right  but i still think about that version sometimes
